title: 3946 BBY
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}}
{{Year

{{Quote|Another G0-T0 in the Gordian Reach has cut its planet off from the HoloNet. Recommend sending in the Republic Navy.|[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] intelligence report filed in 3946 BBY|<ref name="NEGD" />}}
The [[Standard year/Legends|year]] '''3946 before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] (BBY)''', also known as '''293 before the [[Treaty of Coruscant]] (BTC)''', was a standard year during the reign of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tol Cressa]] and the continued reconstruction after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Ten years after the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict between the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system|G0-T0]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], created by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] to facilitate in [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] administration during the reconstruction efforts, were still in place on [[Star system/Legends|systems]] across the galaxy, including those within the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]. In 3946 BBY sixteen rogue droids, which had become autonomous and free of their programming, overthrew the governments on planets in the Gordian Reach. Cutting off all [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] communication and blockading the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], the droids [[Secession of 400100500260026|proclaimed]] the independent territory of [[400100500260026]]. The ''coup d'état'' resulted in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of millions of beings. Chancellor Cressa, however, successfully led the campaign to [[Liberation of 400100500260026|liberate]] the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. In the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]], however, the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] remained unattended to and the subjugation and [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] of planets such as [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]] continued.

==Proem==
{{Quote|You could say I'm something of a… patriot.|The [[G0-T0]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] assigned to [[Telos IV]]|<ref name="TSL">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
In the wake of the [[Jedi Civil War]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tol Cressa]] launched reconstruction initiatives which began with the [[Telosian Restoration Project]],<ref name="NEGD" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]-wide [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] project to make the world habitable,<ref name="TSL" /> in [[3955 BBY]]. To facilitate in the rebuilding efforts, the company [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] launched a series of [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system|G0-T0]] droids. These black, spherical droids were designed to facilitate in planetary administration with safeguards in their programming which limited the droids to acting within the bounds of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] law. The first problem arose, however, with the [[G0-T0|droid assigned to Telos]]. The automaton found it impossible to act in the best interests of the Republic and remain within the boundaries of Republic law. Breaking free of its programming, the droid began to act illegally, all in an effort, however, of stabilizing the Republic and its reconstruction initiatives. It eventually became involved in the [[Exchange]], a crime syndicate, and placed [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on both [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Over the years thereafter, other G0-T0 droids gradually became more and more autonomous.<ref name="NEGD" />

==The galaxy in 3946 BBY==
In 3946 BBY,<ref name="NEGD" /> sixteen G0-T0 droids in the area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] known as the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] unleashed a ''coup d'état'' and overthrew the planetary governments. These droids established themselves as dictators, cutting off all [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] communication. Aligning together, the sixteen droids blockaded the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] which accessed the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] and [[Secession of 400100500260026|abruptly seceded]] from the Galactic Republic.<ref name="CSWE-1">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', G0-T0 entry</ref> Sending out a drone pod, the G0-T0 droids announced that the sixteen planets had formed the independent territory of [[400100500260026]].<ref name="NEGD" /> An intelligence report was filed suggesting the dispatching of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] to free the planets.<ref name="NEGD" /> With millions of beings [[Death/Legends|perishing]] in the ''coup'', Supreme Chancellor Cressa ordered the military to action.<ref name="CSWE-2">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Gordian Reach entry</ref> The [[Liberation of 400100500260026|liberation]] campaign was both highly publicized and successful.<ref name="CSWE-1" />

With the Galactic Republic still recovering from the Jedi Civil War and other prior conflicts, the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] had continued in the [[Kanz sector/Legends|Kanz sector]]. The secessionist conflict that started in [[3970 BBY]] had been ignored by the Republic due to their occupation with a series of wars. By 3946 BBY, the situation had continued unchanged.<ref name="NEC" /> The separatist [[Myrialites]] still had control over the sector and were subjugating the worlds, such as [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]], to [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. As a result, the ongoing creation of [[kinetic communication]] continued.<ref name="DSPL">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20090531/index.html?page=1|text=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd: A Hyperspace Exclusive|int=Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd}}</ref>

==Impact==
The uprising by G0-T0 droids in the Gordian Reach greatly effected Aratech. The corporation struggled as it was viewed unfavorably in light of its product.<ref name="NEGD" /> Eventually, the company restructured and focused on manufacturing [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] and other transportation products.<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Aratech Repulsor Company entry</ref> The highly-publicized liberation of the Gordian Reach<ref name="NEGD" /> along with his reconstruction initiatives secured Cressa as a legendary leader of the Old Republic.<ref name="CSWE-3">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Cressa entry</ref> At the same time, however, the Republic's lack of intervention in the Kanz Disorders allowed the conflict to continue for nearly three hundred more years, until it was finally resolved in [[3670 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Notable events==
*Secession of 400100500260026<ref name="NEGD" />
*Liberation of 400100500260026<ref name="NEGD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The year 3946 BBY and the secession of 400100500260026 was first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', released in [[July]] of [[2006]].<ref name="NEGD" /> The incident later received mention in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' under the entries of Cressa, G0-T0, and the Gordian Reach.<ref name="CSWE-1" /><ref name="CSWE-2" /><ref name="CSWE-3" /> A minor discrepancy occurs, however, in the ''Encyclopedia''. Under the entry for G0-T0, the text indicates that sixteen rogue droids acted in the secessionist ''coup'', a figure in agreement with ''The New Essential Guide to Droids''.<ref name="NEGD" /><ref name="CSWE-1" /> The entry on the Gordian Reach, however, states that it was one rogue droid who instigated the event.<ref name="CSWE-2" /> The ongoing Kanz Disorders received mention in [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']], although without direct dating of the conflict,<ref name="EC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. No specific data for the Kanz Disorders, in relation to 3946 BBY, exists in these sources other than that the conflict was ongoing due to a lack of Republic intervention.<ref name="NEC" />

==Appearances==
